title: I finally stitched together a semi-automated pipeline for strategy testing
author: she-happiest
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/1ktzwg13ejwf1.png?width=1519&format=png&auto=webp&s=ba2b44cf8cb92509e8ffc95884d41c0c79430140

After months of jumping between Jupyter, Excel, and various platforms, I started consolidating everything into a smoother workflow. My ss from [**Nvest⁤iq**](https://www.nvestiq.com/) shows:

* A sample long-short equities strategy
* Backtest execution and output (rolling alpha, drawdowns, etc.)
* Portfolio-level diagnostics and breakdowns
* Ability to monitor it forward without re-coding every time
